name: coordinated-validation
original_description: Multi-platform validation with dependency-aware execution. Validates platforms in dependency order (DB→API→Web, DB→API→iOS), runs independent platforms in parallel, blocks dependent platforms when dependencies fail, and coordinates evidence into a unified cross-platform report.
improved_description: Multi-platform validation respecting cross-platform dependencies: DB→API→Web/iOS. Parallelizes independent layers, blocks downstream when dependencies fail, coordinates evidence waves, prevents race conditions. Use for fullstack projects, mobile+API integration, CI/CD multi-layer verification.
changes_made: Added keywords (parallelizes, waves, integration), explicit use-cases.

name: create-validation-plan
original_description: Generates a structured validation plan with PASS criteria for every user journey before any evidence is captured. Plans define what success looks like upfront.
improved_description: Create BEFORE evidence capture. Defines PASS criteria per journey (P0/P1/P2 priority). Maps routes/endpoints/screens, orders by dependency, checks prerequisites. Use when starting validation, refining journeys, or validating changes. Falsifiable criteria only — no vague goals.
changes_made: Added 'create before', priority system, falsifiability emphasis.

name: design-token-audit
original_description: Verify CSS and Tailwind tokens match the project's design system specification
improved_description: Audit CSS/Tailwind/inline styles against design system spec (DESIGN.md, tailwind.config, CSS vars). Detects hardcoded values, off-palette colors, non-standard spacing, typography drift. Use after style changes, before release, during DS migration, on new codebases.
changes_made: Expanded to name specific sources, violation types.

name: design-validation
original_description: Validate implementation fidelity against design specifications and Stitch-generated references
improved_description: Compare implementation screenshots against design refs (Stitch MCP, DESIGN.md, Figma). Scores colors, typography, spacing, layout, interactions (5-category fidelity). Use after UI implementation, before release, during design reviews, post-refactor for visual regressions.
changes_made: Named sources, scoring method, 5 categories weighted.

name: django-validation
original_description: Django and Flask web application validation through server startup, database migration verification, curl endpoint testing, and Django admin checks. Captures HTTP responses, migration status, and server logs as evidence.
improved_description: Django/Flask validation: dependencies → system check → migrations → server startup → health/CRUD endpoints (GET/POST/PUT/DELETE) → auth flows → admin check. Uses curl, capture HTTP responses/migrations/logs. Also Flask+Gunicorn.

name: e2e-testing
original_description: End-to-end validation patterns — journey design, evidence management, flaky flow handling
improved_description: E2E strategy patterns: design journeys (one goal per journey, precondition→action→assertion). Manage evidence (step-NN naming, inventory). Diagnose flaky flows (3 runs, capture delta, fix root cause). Use for journey planning, handling intermittent failures, organizing cross-journey artifacts.
changes_made: Named journey structure, flaky diagnosis method.

name: e2e-validate
original_description: Full end-to-end validation orchestrator. Detects platform, maps user journeys, defines PASS criteria, captures evidence, writes PASS/FAIL verdicts. Zero mocks. Supports iOS, React Native, Flutter, web, API, CLI, Django/Flask, and fullstack projects.
improved_description: Orchestrator: detect platform → map journeys → PASS criteria → capture evidence → write verdicts (zero mocks). Platform detection (iOS/RN/Flutter/web/API/CLI/Django/fullstack), bottom-up fullstack order, fix loop (3-strike). Use for any project validation start-to-finish.
changes_made: Emphasized zero-mock rule, bottom-up order, 3-strike fix loop.

name: error-recovery
original_description: Structured 3-strike error recovery during validation. When validation fails, diagnoses root cause, applies fix, and re-validates. Use when any validation step fails, builds break, runtime crashes, or network/auth/database errors occur.
improved_description: 3-strike recovery: strike 1 (targeted fix, same step), strike 2 (alt tool/path), strike 3 (rethink assumptions, broader fix). Never mock; fix real cause. Use on build fails, runtime crashes, network/auth/DB errors, flaky flows. Log all 3 attempts.
changes_made: Detailed 3-strike sequence, named specific error types.
